page: Microsoft Azure DC64eds_v5 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCEDV5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 64 dedicated vCPUs and 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory allocation of 4.0 GB per core. The instance is equipped with 2891 GB of local storage and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage options. It does not include integrated GPU hardware or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

This server type is designed with a substantial local storage capacity of 2891 GB, making it suitable for workloads requiring high-capacity local scratch space or temporary database storage. While benchmark data is not available for this specific configuration, the dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities without resource contention from neighboring virtual machines on the host.

The DC64eds_v5 is classified within the memory-optimized category by the vendor, though its 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio also aligns with general-purpose resource distributions. This balance of 64 dedicated cores, 256.0 GB of RAM, and large local storage makes the instance appropriate for relational database hosting, enterprise applications, and data processing tasks. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the inclusion of a large local disk and dedicated compute resources provides a consolidated platform for resource-dense workloads, reducing the need for external storage attachments.
description: Microsoft Azure DC64eds_v5 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the DCEDV5 family, operating under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs and 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance includes 2891 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations, though it does not feature integrated GPU accelerators or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Positioned as a memory-optimized and storage-capable resource, the server offers a balanced allocation of compute and memory alongside a substantial local disk. This hardware profile makes the DC64eds_v5 suitable for database deployments, enterprise application hosting, and data-intensive processing tasks that benefit from dedicated CPU resources and high-capacity local storage.

tagline: A dedicated sixty-four core virtual machine featuring two hundred fifty-six gigabytes of memory and substantial local storage for enterprise workloads.
